Maintainer.Profile: JSONbored publishes Unraid-first All-in-One containers for self-hosted software that normally requires multi-container setup, manual dependency wiring, or compose-heavy deployment. The focus is practical homelab usability: simpler installation, sane defaults, honest documentation about tradeoffs, and support for advanced users who want to override pieces of the stack.
Maintainer.DonateText: If these AIO templates save you time, please consider supporting ongoing maintenance through GitHub Sponsors or Ko-fi.
